ddls:
CREATE TABLE "contacts" (
  "contact_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the contact */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact */,
  "whatsapp" TEXT /* WhatsApp number of the contact */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the contact */,
  "uf" TEXT /* State (UF) of the contact */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the contact */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact */,
  "company" TEXT /* Company of the contact */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the contact */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the contact was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the contact was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_categories" (
  "contact_id" TEXT /* ID of the contact */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the contact was assigned to the category */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the contact-category association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_types" (
  "interaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction type */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Name of the interaction type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "contact_id" TEXT /* ID of the contact */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction type */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the interaction */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the interaction */,
  "next_steps" TEXT /* Next steps to take with the contact */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interaction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interaction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_id") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_interaction_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_type_id") REFERENCES interaction_types ("interaction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales team, manager, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "contact_id" TEXT /* ID of the contact being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the contact */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the contact was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_id") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_teams" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the team (e.g., team lead, member) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
